page_title: Klaus (The Harsh Mistress of the City)
text:
is part of Bernhardt's band of outlaws. He appears in the light novels Attack on Titan: The Harsh Mistress of the City, Part 1 and Attack on Titan: The Harsh Mistress of the City, Part 2.

Appearance

Klaus is a young man of about twenty years of age with sharp eyes. He is wearing a new soldier's uniform when Mathias Kramer first meets him and usually has a moody or annoyed expression on his face.
